text:
Backend API 테스트 완료. 전체 7건 모두 PASS입니다.

## 테스트 결과 요약

| # | 테스트 항목 | 결과 | 상세 |
|---|-----------|------|------|
| 1 | `GET /api/v1/products?brandId=1` | **PASS** | brandName "MONCLER" 상품 1건만 반환, totalElements=1 |
| 2 | `GET /api/v1/products?brandId=1&categoryId=1` | **PASS** | brandId=1 + categoryId=1 교집합 정상 적용, 1건 반환 |
| 3 | `GET /api/v1/products` (필터 없음) | **PASS** | 전체 55개 상품 반환, 기존 기능 정상 동작 |
| 4 | `GET /api/v1/products?brandId=2&sort=PRICE_ASC` | **PASS** | brandId=2 (STONE ISLAND) 필터 + 정렬 파라미터 적용, 200 응답 |
| 5 | `GET /api/v1/products?brandId=9999` | **PASS** | 빈 배열 반환 (content=[]), 에러 없이 200 응답 |
| 6 | `GET /api/v1/brands/1/followers/count` | **PASS** | `{"count": 0}` 정상 응답, 200 |
| 7 | `GET /api/v1/products?brandId=2&page=0&size=2` | **PASS** | size=2 페이징 적용, totalElements=1, 정상 동작 |

**결론: 7/7 PASS - brandId 필터 및 관련 엔드포인트 모두 정상 동작합니다.**

Frontend feature tests completed. All 6 test cases PASS.

**Test Results:**

| # | Test Case | Result | Details |
|---|-----------|--------|---------|
| 1 | Brand page route build inclusion | PASS | `brands/[id]/page.tsx` exists with default export (line 125) |
| 2a | useSearchParams for name param | PASS | `page.tsx:24,26` - `searchParams.get('name')` |
| 2b | useProducts with brandId | PASS | `page.tsx:33-34` - `useProducts(undefined, sort, brandId)` |
| 2c | IntersectionObserver infinite scroll | PASS | `page.tsx:40-52` - observer calls `fetchNextPage()` |
| 2d | Follow/unfollow button | PASS | `page.tsx:73-84` - conditional button with `toggleFollow` |
| 2e | Suspense boundary wrapping | PASS | `page.tsx:125-131` - `<Suspense>` wraps `<BrandContent />` |
| 3 | Pick page brand link `/brands/{id}?name=...` | PASS | `pick/page.tsx:111-113` - Link with `encodeURIComponent` |
| 4 | ProductCard cache invalidation | PASS | `ProductCard.tsx:52` - `queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['picks'] })` |
| 5 | useProducts hook brandId support | PASS | `useProducts.ts:8,10,14` - brandId in signature, queryKey, and API params |
| 6 | products API brandId support | PASS | `products.ts:6,22-28` - brandId in both object and function APIs |

All implementations are correctly wired. No issues found.
summary: All 6 frontend tests PASS - brand page and pick cache verified
